jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - MRF - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? MRF in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!
